member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.LuceneQueryParser
member.summary: Parses a string according to the rules of the grammar.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.LuceneQueryParser.Parse(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string according to the rules of the grammar.
member.param: The optional file name to use in error messages.
member.exception: Thrown when parsing fails against . The exception's Data["cursor"] will be set with the cursor where the fatal error occurred.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.LuceneQueryParser.Parse(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Pegasus.Common.LexicalElement}@)
member.summary: Parses a string according to the rules of the grammar.
member.param: The optional file name to use in error messages.
When this method returns, contains the lexical elements for the parsing subject. This parameter is passed uninitialized.
member.exception: Thrown when parsing fails against . The exception's Data["cursor"] will be set with the cursor where the fatal error occurred.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.IQueryParser
member.summary: Defines a parser that converts query strings into an AST.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.IQueryParser.ParseAsync(System.String,Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext)
member.summary: Parses a query string into an abstract syntax tree.
member.param: Optional visitor context for parsing configuration.
member.returns: The root node of the parsed query AST, or null if parsing failed. When null is returned, check the context's validation result for error details. Derived parsers (e.g., ElasticQueryParser) may return null when a occurs during visitor processing, recording the error in the validation result rather than throwing.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode
member.summary: Represents a node in the parsed query abstract syntax tree (AST).
member.remarks: All query elements (terms, groups, ranges) implement this interface. Use to traverse the tree with a visitor.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode.Parent
member.summary: The parent node in the AST, or null for the root node.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode.Children
member.summary: The child nodes of this node.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode.Data
member.summary: Extensible property bag for storing custom data during visitor traversal.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode.AcceptAsync(Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryNodeVisitor,Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext)
member.summary: Accepts a visitor for tree traversal using the visitor pattern.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode.ToString
member.summary: Returns the query string representation of this node.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode.Clone
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of this node and its children.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryNode
member.summary: A query node that targets a specific field with optional negation.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryNode.IsNegated
member.summary: Whether this node is negated (NOT operator applied).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryNode.Prefix
member.summary: The prefix modifier (+, -, etc.) applied to this node.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryNode.Field
member.summary: The field name this query targets, or null for default field queries.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryNode.UnescapedField
member.summary: The field name with escape sequences resolved.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryWithProximityAndBoostNode
member.summary: A field query node that supports Lucene boost and proximity operators.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryWithProximityAndBoostNode.Boost
member.summary: The boost factor (^) to increase or decrease relevance scoring.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryWithProximityAndBoostNode.UnescapedBoost
member.summary: The boost value with escape sequences resolved.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryWithProximityAndBoostNode.Proximity
member.summary: The proximity/slop factor (~) for fuzzy or phrase proximity searches.
member.remarks: Non-null when the tilde (~) operator is present. For unquoted terms (e.g., roam~0.8), this indicates a fuzzy search with edit distance. For quoted terms (e.g., "jakarta apache"~10), this indicates a phrase proximity search with word slop. An empty string means the bare tilde was used with no explicit value (e.g., term~).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IFieldQueryWithProximityAndBoostNode.UnescapedProximity
member.summary: The proximity value with escape sequences resolved.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.QueryValidationError.Message
member.summary: The validation error message.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.QueryValidationError.Index
member.summary: Index where the validation error occurs in the query string.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IChainableQueryVisitor
member.summary: A visitor that can be composed with other visitors in a processing pipeline.
member.remarks: Use to combine multiple chainable visitors.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryNodeVisitor
member.summary: Defines a visitor for traversing query AST nodes.
member.remarks: Implement this interface to create custom query transformations or analysis.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryNodeVisitor.VisitAsync(Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode,Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext)
member.summary: Visits a node in the query AST.
member.param: The visitor context containing traversal state.
member.returns: The visited node, potentially transformed. Returns null to signal node removal.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryNodeVisitorWithResult`1
member.summary: A visitor that produces a typed result after traversing the query AST.
member.typeparam: The type of result produced by the visitor.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryNodeVisitorWithResult`1.AcceptAsync(Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.IQueryNode,Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext)
member.summary: Traverses the AST starting from the given node and returns a result.
member.param: The root node to start traversal from.
The visitor context containing traversal state.
member.returns: The result of visiting the AST.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext
member.summary: Provides context and configuration for query visitor traversal.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext.DefaultOperator
member.summary: The default boolean operator (AND/OR) when not explicitly specified in the query.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext.DefaultFields
member.summary: The default fields to search when no field is specified in a term.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext.QueryType
member.summary: The type of query being processed (query, aggregation, sort).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext.Data
member.summary: Extensible property bag for storing custom data during visitor traversal.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithFieldResolver
member.summary: Extends with field name resolution capabilities.
member.remarks: Use this to implement field aliasing or dynamic field name mapping.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithFieldResolver.FieldResolver
member.summary: Resolves field names to their actual storage names or aliases.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithIncludeResolver
member.summary: Extends with query include/macro expansion.
member.remarks: Includes allow reusable query fragments to be referenced by name (e.g., @myfilter).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithIncludeResolver.IncludeResolver
member.summary: Resolves include names to their query string definitions.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithValidation
member.summary: Extends with query validation capabilities.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithValidation.ValidationOptions
member.summary: Configuration options controlling validation behavior.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContextWithValidation.ValidationResult
member.summary: The validation results populated after validation completes.
